name: Rust Crate Release Pipeline
description: MSRV verification, feature matrix testing, semver checks, and docs.rs quality for crate publishing.

phases.name: Pre-Release Audit

delegates.task_template: Perform full crate publishing audit: MSRV, feature flags, no_std, semver checks, docs.rs quality for: ${goal}

phases.checkpoint: Crate audit complete with all checks passing

delegates.task_template: Run full test suite including doc tests and feature powerset for: ${goal}
Security audit of public API surface and unsafe code blocks for: ${goal}
Prepare changelog, version bump, and publish crate for: ${goal}
